'''dodashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationless|vacationless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationless|vacationless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dodashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodashithi|dodashithi]] || [[word:dodashiji|dodashiji]] || [[word:dodashishi|dodashishi]] || [[word:dodashiki|dodashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodashuthuthu|dodashuthuthu]] || [[word:dodashujuju|dodashujuju]] || [[word:dodashushushu|dodashushushu]] || [[word:dodashukuku|dodashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodashuthu|dodashuthu]] || [[word:dodashuju|dodashuju]] || [[word:dodashushu|dodashushu]] || [[word:dodashuku|dodashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodashufthuf|dodashufthuf]] || [[word:dodashufjuf|dodashufjuf]] || [[word:dodashufshuf|dodashufshuf]] || [[word:dodashufkuf|dodashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodashethe|dodashethe]] || [[word:dodasheje|dodasheje]] || [[word:dodasheshe|dodasheshe]] || [[word:dodasheke|dodasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodashothotho|dodashothotho]] || [[word:dodashojojo|dodashojojo]] || [[word:dodashoshosho|dodashoshosho]] || [[word:dodashokoko|dodashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodashotho|dodashotho]] || [[word:dodashojo|dodashojo]] || [[word:dodashosho|dodashosho]] || [[word:dodashoko|dodashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodashofthof|dodashofthof]] || [[word:dodashofjof|dodashofjof]] || [[word:dodashofshof|dodashofshof]] || [[word:dodashofkof|dodashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfthĂŻf|dodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfjĂŻf|dodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfshĂŻf|dodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfkĂŻf|dodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dodashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dodashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dodashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dodashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfthĂŻf|dodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfjĂŻf|dodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfshĂŻf|dodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfkĂŻf|dodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfthĂŻf|dodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfjĂŻf|dodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfshĂŻf|dodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dodashĂŻfkĂŻf|dodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodashĂŠthĂŠ|dodashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dodashĂŠjĂŠ|dodashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dodashĂŠshĂŠ|dodashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dodashĂŠkĂŠ|dodashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodashathatha|dodashathatha]] || [[word:dodashajaja|dodashajaja]] || [[word:dodashashasha|dodashashasha]] || [[word:dodashakaka|dodashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodashatha|dodashatha]] || [[word:dodashaja|dodashaja]] || [[word:dodashasha|dodashasha]] || [[word:dodashaka|dodashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodashafthaf|dodashafthaf]] || [[word:dodashafjaf|dodashafjaf]] || [[word:dodashafshaf|dodashafshaf]] || [[word:dodashafkaf|dodashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dodashasha|dodashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodashshĂ«asha|dodashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodashroasha|dodashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodashmuasha|dodashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodashyaasha|dodashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododashnkshĂ«asha|gododashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododashnkroasha|gododashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododashnkmuasha|gododashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododashnkyaasha|gododashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dodadashasha|dodadashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodadashshĂ«asha|dodadashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodadashroasha|dodadashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodadashmuasha|dodadashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodadashyaasha|dodadashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododadashnkshĂ«asha|gododadashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododadashnkroasha|gododadashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododadashnkmuasha|gododadashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododadashnkyaasha|gododadashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dedĂŠshasha|dedĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dedĂŠshshĂ«asha|dedĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dedĂŠshroasha|dedĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dedĂŠshmuasha|dedĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dedĂŠshyaasha|dedĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godedĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|godedĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godedĂŠshnkroasha|godedĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godedĂŠshnkmuasha|godedĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godedĂŠshnkyaasha|godedĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dodfashasha|dodfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodfashshĂ«asha|dodfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodfashroasha|dodfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodfashmuasha|dodfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodfashyaasha|dodfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododfashnkshĂ«asha|gododfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododfashnkroasha|gododfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododfashnkmuasha|gododfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododfashnkyaasha|gododfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
